pkgmetadata.longdescription:
Plymouth boot theme built on the upstream two-step plugin.
Renders a centered rotating infinity spinner on a black background with a thin white progress bar at the bottom. The LUKS unlock dialog is a white pill (80% opacity) with solid white dot bullets, no lock icon, no surrounding box.
Reuses the stock spinfinity throbber, keyboard layout and capslock assets via symlinks; ships custom box.png, entry.png, bullet.png and lock.png.
